arts.ttl: Chiesa will play for Liverpool ‘if needed’ against Milan, but not as a starter
arts.sum: Liverpool coach Arne Slot has confirmed that Italy international Federico Chiesa will play in Tuesday’s...

arts.ttl: New Champions League format is SLAMMED by Liverpool star Alisson on the eve of its opening night as goalkeeper says players are 'tired' of being ignored over fixture pile-up
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Tired stars are growing frustrated at football authorities for adding more games to an already jam-packed calendar as Tuesday sees the new format come into force.

arts.ttl: Chiesa in line for Liverpool debut as Slot delivers team news
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa is set to be handed his Liverpool debut by Arne Slot when they take on AC Milan in the Uefa Champions League on Tuesday night. The 26-year-old signed a four-year deal after completing his switch from Juventus for a £10m transfer fee in the summer. The Reds could pay a further £2.5m in […] The post Chiesa in line for Liverpool debut as Slot delivers team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends clear 'respect' message to Liverpool players ahead of AC Milan test
arts.sum: Liverpool open their Champions League campaign at the San Siro against AC Milan on Tuesday night and will be aiming to bounce back from their shock defeat against Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Team News: AC Milan vs. Liverpool injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between AC Milan and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: I was at Arne Slot press conference and he gave perfect Liverpool answer to difficult Italian question
arts.sum: Arne Slot was asked whether his Liverpool team would be "scared" of facing AC Milan

arts.ttl: Champions League: Slot provides Liverpool assessment ahead of Milan trip
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot admitted that he has ‘a lot of respect’ for Milan, but...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's pre-AC Milan press conference: 'It's a big game - one to look forward to' - Liverpool FC
arts.sum: It's difficult to say before you start, but I think it's clear if you want to end up in the first eight you have to win a lot of games and you need a lot of points. For me, it had a lot to do with the playing style of the opponent, who made it really difficult for us, but in the end if you don't win then you try to look at as many arguments as you can find - and I also asked myself the question, 'OK, does it have to do with the things you said?' But I prefer to look at the game back and see what we did well, what we didn’t do well and I think we could have done a lot of things much better that was not related to rotation.

arts.ttl: Alisson Becker: We have to be ready for AC Milan and at our very best
arts.sum: For us players as well, it’s a good thing that you are going to play against the best in Europe. Everybody is enthusiastic about Federico and he is extremely happy about having this chance of playing in our squad.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals Liverpool plan for Federico Chiesa ahead of AC Milan clash in Champions League
arts.sum: Chiesa yet to make first appearance this season after signing from Juventus
